requirement_topic.en: CNE Mandatory Energy Label — Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps (Star Rating)
requirement_topic.zh: CNE强制能效标签——空调器与热泵（星级评定）
requirement_topic.zht: CNE強制能效標籤——空調器與熱泵（星級評定）

summary.en: Chile's Comisión Nacional de Energía (CNE), through its PPEE (Programa País de Eficiencia Energética) framework and the Ministerio de Energía, mandates an energy efficiency label for air conditioners and heat-pump products sold in Chile. The label uses a star-rating scale (typically 1–5 stars) derived from measured COP/EER values. Products must display the Chilean energy label prominently; the label format, rating class thresholds, and test method alignment (based on IEC/NCh standards) are defined by CNE resolutions. The label must be in Spanish and display the rated capacity, COP/EER, and star category.
summary.zh: 智利国家能源委员会（CNE）通过其国家能效计划（PPEE）框架及能源部要求，在智利销售的空调器和热泵产品须强制标注能效标签。标签采用基于实测COP/EER值的星级评定制度（通常为1至5星）。产品须醒目展示智利能效标签；标签格式、评级门槛及测试方法（基于IEC/NCh标准）由CNE决议规定。标签须使用西班牙语，并标明额定容量、COP/EER及星级类别。
summary.zht: 智利國家能源委員會（CNE）通過其國家能效計畫（PPEE）框架及能源部要求，在智利銷售的空調器和熱泵產品須強制標注能效標籤。標籤採用基於實測COP/EER值的星級評定制度（通常為1至5星）。產品須醒目展示智利能效標籤；標籤格式、評級門檻及測試方法（基於IEC/NCh標準）由CNE決議規定。標籤須使用西班牙語，並標明額定容量、COP/EER及星級類別。

standards_or_laws: Ley 20.936 / Ley de Transmisión Eléctrica (energy policy framework)
Decreto Supremo del Ministerio de Energía on mandatory energy labelling for air conditioners
CNE / PPEE energy label resolutions for climatización (air conditioning and heat pumps)
NCh/IEC test method standards for COP/EER measurement

summary.en: China requires a mandatory energy efficiency label (中国能效标识) for room air conditioners under the China Energy Label system administered by MIIT and SAMR, using GB 21455 (MEPS for room air conditioners) and GB/T 7725 test methods. The Chinese label uses a 1–5 tier scale (Grade 1 most efficient). GB 25454 covers multi-split systems. Chinese energy label evidence and test reports based on GB standards are not accepted as Chilean CNE label compliance; Chilean-format labels and CNE-recognised test data are required.
summary.zh: 中国通过工业和信息化部与市场监管总局主管的中国能效标识制度，要求房间空调器强制标注能效标识，采用GB 21455（房间空调器能效限定值及能效等级）和GB/T 7725测试方法。中国标签采用1至5级制度（1级效率最高）。GB 25454覆盖多联机系统。中国能效标识证据及基于GB标准的测试报告不被接受为智利CNE标签合规依据；须提供智利格式标签和CNE认可的测试数据。
summary.zht: 中國通過工業和信息化部與市場監管總局主管的中國能效標識制度，要求房間空調器強制標注能效標識，採用GB 21455（房間空調器能效限定值及能效等級）和GB/T 7725測試方法。中國標籤採用1至5級制度（1級效率最高）。GB 25454覆蓋多聯機系統。中國能效標識證據及基於GB標準的測試報告不被接受為智利CNE標籤合規依據；須提供智利格式標籤和CNE認可的測試數據。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label system (中国能效标识)
GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners

gap.en: The Chinese energy efficiency label (中国能效标识) is not accepted in Chile. Products sold in Chile must bear the CNE-prescribed Chilean energy label in Spanish, with COP/EER values measured to NCh/IEC test methods and classified on the Chilean star scale. Existing Chinese GB-based test reports may require supplementary testing or re-calculation to align with CNE label thresholds. Label artwork must conform to the Chilean regulatory format.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不被智利接受。在智利销售的产品须贴附CNE规定的西班牙语智利能效标签，COP/EER值须按NCh/IEC测试方法测量，并按智利星级刻度分级。现有中国GB测试报告可能需要补充测试或重新计算，以符合CNE标签门槛。标签图样须符合智利法规格式。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不被智利接受。在智利銷售的產品須貼附CNE規定的西班牙語智利能效標籤，COP/EER值須按NCh/IEC測試方法測量，並按智利星級刻度分級。現有中國GB測試報告可能需要補充測試或重新計算，以符合CNE標籤門檻。標籤圖樣須符合智利法規格式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CNE energy label required before sale of air conditioners and heat pumps in Chile
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under China Energy Label system for domestic market; not accepted as Chilean CNE label

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Chilean CNE energy label (star rating, Spanish) mandatory before sale; Chinese 中国能效标识 not accepted; re-testing or COP/EER recalculation to NCh/IEC methods and Chilean label format compliance required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——销售前须强制贴附智利CNE能效标签（星级，西班牙语）；中国能效标识不被接受；须按NCh/IEC方法重新测试或重新计算COP/EER，并符合智利标签格式要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——銷售前須強制貼附智利CNE能效標籤（星級，西班牙語）；中國能效標識不被接受；須按NCh/IEC方法重新測試或重新計算COP/EER，並符合智利標籤格式要求。

requirement_topic.en: CNE Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: CNE最低能效标准（MEPS）——空调器与热泵
requirement_topic.zht: CNE最低能效標準（MEPS）——空調器與熱泵

summary.en: Chile's energy efficiency framework, coordinated by CNE and the Ministerio de Energía under the PPEE programme, establishes Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for air conditioners and heat-pump products. Products that do not meet the minimum COP/EER threshold for their rated capacity class may not be legally imported or sold in Chile. MEPS thresholds are periodically revised upward. Importers are responsible for ensuring that units meet the applicable MEPS prior to entry and during the market life of the product.
summary.zh: 智利能源效率框架由CNE和能源部通过PPEE计划协调，为空调器和热泵产品设立最低能效标准（MEPS）。不满足其额定容量级别最低COP/EER门槛的产品不得合法进口或在智利销售。MEPS门槛定期上调。进口商须确保设备在入境前及产品市场生命周期内满足适用MEPS要求。
summary.zht: 智利能源效率框架由CNE和能源部通過PPEE計畫協調，為空調器和熱泵產品設立最低能效標準（MEPS）。不滿足其額定容量級別最低COP/EER門檻的產品不得合法進口或在智利銷售。MEPS門檻定期上調。進口商須確保設備在入境前及產品市場生命週期內滿足適用MEPS要求。

standards_or_laws: Decreto Supremo del Ministerio de Energía establishing MEPS for air conditioning equipment
CNE PPEE — Programa País de Eficiencia Energética (MEPS resolutions)
NCh/IEC performance test standards for COP/EER determination

summary.en: China's GB 21455 establishes five energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners, with Grade 1 as the highest. Grade 3 or above constitutes the domestic MEPS floor for Chinese market access. GB 25454 covers multi-split systems. Chinese MEPS are set against GB/T 7725 test conditions and seasonal metrics (APF). Chinese MEPS compliance evidence (CCC test reports, GB 21455 grade declarations) is not transferable to Chilean CNE MEPS obligations.
summary.zh: 中国GB 21455为房间空调器设立五个能效等级，1级为最高。3级及以上构成中国市场准入的国内MEPS基准。GB 25454覆盖多联机系统。中国MEPS依据GB/T 7725测试条件和季节性指标（APF）设定。中国MEPS合规证据（CCC测试报告、GB 21455等级声明）不可转用于智利CNE MEPS义务。
summary.zht: 中國GB 21455為房間空調器設立五個能效等級，1級為最高。3級及以上構成中國市場准入的國內MEPS基準。GB 25454覆蓋多聯機系統。中國MEPS依據GB/T 7725測試條件和季節性指標（APF）設定。中國MEPS合規證據（CCC測試報告、GB 21455等級聲明）不可轉用於智利CNE MEPS義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners
GB/T 7725 — Room air conditioners (test method, APF)

gap.en: Chinese GB 21455 MEPS and test data are not accepted as Chilean CNE MEPS compliance. Products must be verified against Chilean MEPS thresholds using NCh/IEC-aligned test data. As Chilean MEPS thresholds are revised periodically, importers must confirm the current applicable minimum COP/EER with CNE or the Ministerio de Energía before each shipment.
gap.zh: 中国GB 21455 MEPS和测试数据不被接受为智利CNE MEPS合规依据。产品须使用NCh/IEC测试数据对照智利MEPS门槛进行核验。由于智利MEPS门槛定期修订，进口商须在每次出货前向CNE或能源部确认当前适用的最低COP/EER值。
gap.zht: 中國GB 21455 MEPS和測試數據不被接受為智利CNE MEPS合規依據。產品須使用NCh/IEC測試數據對照智利MEPS門檻進行核驗。由於智利MEPS門檻定期修訂，進口商須在每次出貨前向CNE或能源部確認當前適用的最低COP/EER值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products not meeting Chilean MEPS may not be imported or sold in Chile
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 21455 Grade 3 floor for Chinese domestic market; not transferable to Chilean CNE MEPS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Chilean MEPS mandatory before import; Chinese GB 21455 evidence not accepted; COP/EER must be verified against current CNE MEPS thresholds using NCh/IEC test data before each shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——进口前须满足智利MEPS强制要求；中国GB 21455证据不被接受；每次出货前须使用NCh/IEC测试数据对照当前CNE MEPS门槛核验COP/EER。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——進口前須滿足智利MEPS強制要求；中國GB 21455證據不被接受；每次出貨前須使用NCh/IEC測試數據對照當前CNE MEPS門檻核驗COP/EER。
